# callbag-recharge
> State that flows. Reactive state management for TypeScript.

## What it does
Reactive state management with 6 primitives: state, derived, dynamicDerived, effect, producer, operator.
Glitch-free diamond resolution via two-phase push. 70+ tree-shakeable operators.
Protocol-native lifecycle signals (RESET, PAUSE, RESUME, TEARDOWN).
Framework-agnostic. Works frontend, backend, edge. Zero dependencies. 170+ modules.

## When to use
- Simple state management (like Zustand/Jotai but framework-agnostic, no providers)
- Streaming data (LLM token streams, WebSocket, SSE) flowing into reactive state
- Cancellable async operations (switchMap auto-cancels previous)
- Derived/computed values that are always consistent (diamond-safe, cached)
- Agentic workflows (session state, tool call lifecycle, multi-agent coordination)
- Event pipelines with 70+ operators for transform, buffer, window, error handling
- Reactive data structures (reactiveMap, reactiveLog, reactiveIndex) with near-native perf
- Scheduled pipelines (cron triggers, task state, DAG validation, checkpoint persistence)
- Message queues and job processing (Pulsar-inspired topic/subscription system)
- Cross-thread reactive stores (Web Worker, SharedWorker, Service Worker, BroadcastChannel)
- On-device / edge LLM streaming state management (WebLLM, Ollama, ExecuTorch)
- Durable workflows with checkpoint persistence (file, SQLite, IndexedDB adapters)
- Live pipeline monitoring via SSE sink adapter

## Core API (6 primitives)
- `state(initial)` — readable/writable store. .get(), .set(value), .update(fn), .source (callbag)
- `derived([deps], fn)` — cached computed store, recomputes when deps change. .get(), .source
- `dynamicDerived(fn)` — like derived but deps discovered at runtime via tracking get function. Deps can change between recomputations
- `effect([deps], fn)` — side-effect, runs when all deps resolve. Returns dispose function
- `producer(fn?, opts?)` — push-based source with cleanup. Actions: emit, complete, error. Options: initial, equals, resetOnTeardown, resubscribable
- `operator([deps], init, handler)` — custom transform node. Handler receives (depIndex, type, data)

## Composition
- `pipe(source, op1, op2, ...)` — compose operators into inspectable store chain
- `batch(fn)` — defer emissions until outermost batch ends
- `pipeRaw(source, fn1, fn2, ...)` — fuse transforms into single derived for ~2x throughput

## Lifecycle Signals
- `subscribe()` returns `Subscription` with `signal()` method
- `sub.signal(RESET)` — reset all upstream state to initial
- `sub.signal(PAUSE)` / `sub.signal(RESUME)` — pause/resume activity
- `sub.signal(TEARDOWN)` — terminate the graph (cascades END downstream)
- Signals propagate through the reactive graph via TYPE 3 STATE channel

## Operators (import from callbag-recharge/extra)
Sources: interval, fromIter, fromAsyncIter, fromEvent, fromPromise, fromObs, fromAny, of, empty, throwError, never
Filtering: filter, take, skip, first, last, find, elementAt, distinctUntilChanged, takeUntil, takeWhile
Transformation: map, scan, pairwise, startWith, flat, switchMap, concatMap, exhaustMap, groupBy
Combination: merge, combine, concat, race, withLatestFrom, partition
Time: debounce, throttle, delay, timeout, sample, audit
Buffering: buffer, bufferCount, bufferTime
Windowing: window, windowCount, windowTime
Aggregation: reduce, toArray
Error handling: rescue, retry, repeat
Utilities: tap, share, remember, subject, wrap, cached, pausable
Sinks: forEach, subscribe

## Data structures (import from callbag-recharge/data)
- `reactiveMap<K,V>()` — reactive key-value store. select(), keysStore, sizeStore, events, TTL, eviction, namespaces
- `reactiveLog<T>()` — append-only reactive log. Bounded mode (circular buffer). lengthStore, latest, tail(n)
- `reactiveIndex<PK,IK,V>()` — dual-key reactive index. O(1) reverse map. 1.01x native Map.get reads
- `reactiveList<T>()` — ordered collection with positional operations
- `pubsub()` — topic-based publish/subscribe. Each topic is a lazy state store
- `compaction(log, keyFn)` — composable log compaction, retains latest per key

## Messaging (import from callbag-recharge/messaging)
- `topic<T>(name, opts?)` — persistent append-only stream. Priority, delay, dedup, schema validation, compaction
- `subscription(topic, opts)` — cursor-based consumer. Modes: exclusive, shared, failover, key_shared. Pull-based backpressure, ack/nack
- `repeatPublish(topic, value, opts)` — scheduled message production via interval or cron
- `jobQueue<T>(name, processor, opts?)` — topic + subscription + processing. Concurrency control, retry, DLQ
- `jobFlow(queues, edges, opts?)` — multi-queue workflow chaining with diagram export

## Orchestration (import from callbag-recharge/orchestrate)
- `pipeline(steps)` — declarative workflow builder, auto-wires via topological sort
- `task(deps, fn)` — work step with AbortSignal. fn(signal, values)
- `step(factory, deps?)` — raw reactive source wrapper
- `branch(dep, pred)` — binary conditional routing
- `approval(dep, opts)` — human-in-the-loop with approve/reject/modify
- `gate()` — pipe operator for approval queuing
- `taskState<T>({ id })` — reactive task tracker (status, duration, error, runCount as companion stores)
- `forEach(dep, fn)` — fan-out: spawn N parallel tasks from array
- `onFailure(dep, handler)` — dead letter / error handler step
- `wait(dep, ms | signal)` — delay or signal-based wait
- `subPipeline(deps, factory)` — nested child pipeline per trigger
- `join(deps, strategy)` — merge strategies (append, merge-by-key, intersect)
- `sensor(dep, poll, opts?)` — Airflow sensor pattern
- `loop(deps, factory, opts?)` — declarative iteration
- `executionLog(opts)` — reactive execution history
- `pipelineRunner(configs[])` — supervisor with health checks and auto-restart
- `toMermaid(steps)` / `toD2(steps)` — DAG diagram export
- `fromCron(schedule)` — cron trigger (zero-dep parser)
- `fromTrigger()` — manual trigger source
- Checkpoint adapters: memoryAdapter(), fileAdapter(), sqliteAdapter(), indexedDBAdapter()

## Worker (import from callbag-recharge/worker)
- `workerBridge(worker, opts)` — main-thread side: expose/import stores across threads
- `workerSelf(opts)` — worker-side: expose/import stores back to main thread
- Auto-detects Worker, SharedWorker, ServiceWorker, BroadcastChannel, MessagePort
- Lifecycle signals (RESET/PAUSE/RESUME/TEARDOWN) serialize across the wire
- Batch coalescing: multiple store changes in batch() → one postMessage
- `withConnectionStatus(store)` — connection lifecycle companion stores

## Adapters (import from callbag-recharge/adapters)
- `fromWebhook(opts?)` — HTTP trigger source with request-response wiring
- `fromWebSocket(url)` / `toWebSocket(ws)` — reactive WebSocket bridge
- `toSSE(source, opts?)` — Server-Sent Events sink, stream store values to browser
- `fromHTTP(url, opts?)` — fetch-based HTTP source with polling, headers, transform

## Patterns (import from callbag-recharge/patterns)
- `createStore` — Zustand-compatible API with diamond-safe selectors
- `chatStream` — LLM streaming with history, cancel, retry, rate limiting
- `memoryStore` — three-tier AI memory: session, working, long-term
- `agentLoop` — agent tool-call loop with gate/approval
- `textEditor` — text editor state (undo/redo, cursor, selection)
- `formField` — form field with sync + async validation
- `undoRedo` — state with undo/redo history
- `pagination` — paginated data fetching with auto-cancel
- `rateLimiter` — reactive rate-limiting (drop/queue/error strategies)
- `commandBus` — command pattern with undo support
- `toolCallState` — LLM tool call state machine
- `focusManager` — focus tracking across elements
- `hybridRoute` — cloud+edge model routing
- `selection` — multi-select state
- `textBuffer` — text buffer with cursor tracking

## Compat layers (drop-in API replacements + framework bindings)
- `callbag-recharge/compat/zustand` — create() matching StoreApi
- `callbag-recharge/compat/jotai` — atom() with dynamic dep tracking
- `callbag-recharge/compat/nanostores` — atom(), computed(), map()
- `callbag-recharge/compat/signals` — TC39 Signal.State, Signal.Computed
- `callbag-recharge/compat/vue` — useStore(store), useSubscribe(store)
- `callbag-recharge/compat/react` — useStore(store), useSubscribe(store)
- `callbag-recharge/compat/svelte` — useSubscribe(store)
- `callbag-recharge/compat/solid` — useSubscribe(store)

## Inspectability
- `Inspector.inspect(store)` — { name, kind, value, status }
- `Inspector.graph()` — Map of all named stores
- `Inspector.getEdges()` — dependency graph
- `Inspector.snapshot()` — JSON-serializable graph state
- `Inspector.toMermaid()` / `Inspector.toD2()` — graph as diagram text
- `Inspector.observe(store)` — protocol-level test utility
- Zero per-store cost via WeakMaps

## Install
npm i @callbag-recharge/callbag-recharge

## Links
- Docs: https://callbag-recharge.github.io/callbag-recharge/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Callbag-Recharge/callbag-recharge
